song.title: What the World Will Never Take
song.presentation: V1 P C V1 P C E
song.lyrics:
[v1] With all I'm holding inside With all my hopes and desires And all the dreams that I've dreamt With all I'm hoping to be And all that the world will bring And all that fails to compare
[p] You say You want all of me I wouldn't have it any other way
[c] I've got a Savior and He's living in me Whoa, I wanna know, I wanna know You today And You're the bes thing that has happened to me And the world will never take The world will never take You away
[e] No one could ever take You away No one could ever take You away
